Located in the [[Abregado-rae Spaceport]] on the planet [[Abregado-rae/Legends|Abregado-rae]], the '''LoBue Cantina''' was a bar and casino located near the [[Old Patch]]. Despite seeming small on the outside, the inside was the location of not only a bar and dance floor, but also a good number of tables. Notable at the cantina were [[Kampl]] and [[Cyru]], the [[Security guard/Legends|security guards]], and a huge, bushy-bearded regular known only as [[The Reverend]].

About a [[1 BBY/Legends|year before]] the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] visited LoBue. A [[Holochess/Legends|holochess]] game between the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] and a [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] became violent when Chewbacca became angered by a move made by his opponent. [[Fynn Torve]], a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who worked for [[Talon Karrde]] once met with and [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] at the LoBue Cantina.
